creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
The libaudiofile port only checks for freebsd versions 2 or 3, so
	shared libraries do not get built under 4.0-CURRENT.
	This breaks other ports looking for LIB_DEPENDS= audiofile.0

Fix: Apply patch below:
	


-Chris--A22TBbgqdaP31AQfkX3EQQQqPa2o3jf7KXPx1bG8q42awMSD
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- audio/libaudiofile/patches/patch-aa.orig    Tue Jan 26 18:14:14 1999
+++ audio/libaudiofile/patches/patch-aa Tue Jan 26 18:14:29 1999
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@
 +  shlibpath_var=LD_LIBRARY_PATH
 +  ;;
 +
-+freebsd3*)
++freebsd3* | freebsd4*)
 +  version_type=freebsd
 +  library_names_spec='$libname.so.$versuffix $libname.so'
 +  if [ $PORTOBJFORMAT = elf ]; then
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/audio/libaudiofile && make install
